creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Trond.Endrestol from comment #0)
> Cannot mix incompatible Qt library (5.15.7) with this library (5.15.8)
This is a notoriously known stupidity of Qt libraries which do not allow components with even minor version differences to be used together.  You need to find which Qt library you have installed is at version 5.15.7 and upgrade it so it matches the others.

If you want to git rid of this stupidity once and for all, patch the QObjectPrivate::checkForIncompatibleLibraryVersion() inside Qt's `src/corelib/kernel/qobject_p.h` or rebuild it with QT_BUILD_INTERNAL as the nearby comment suggests.
